tools.name: knowledge-repo-browser.listFiles
tools.description: List files in a repository path. Signature: repo.listFiles({ path: string }).

path.description: The path to list files from.

tools.name: knowledge-repo-browser.readFile
tools.description: Read the content of a file in a repository. Signature: repo.readFile({ path: string }).

tools.name: knowledge-repo-browser.headFile
tools.description: Read the first N lines of a file in a repository. Signature: repo.headFile({ path: string, lines?: number }).

lines.description: The number of lines to read. Default is 3.

tools.name: knowledge-repo-browser.writeFile
tools.description: Write content to a file in the repository. Creates a new commit. Signature: repo.writeFile({ path: string, content: string, commitMessage?: string }).
